headline: PayPal NFL Deal Puts Peer To Peer Push In Investor Focus
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) has entered a multi year partnership with the NFL to become the league's official peer to peer payments partner. The deal integrates PayPal's payment services across the NFL ecosystem, including fan experiences and payment options. The partnership is designed to offer NFL fans unique benefits and access to exclusive experiences linked to PayPal's platform. For investors watching NasdaqGS:PYPL, this agreement connects PayPal directly with one of the most...

headline: PayPal Stock Is Down More Than 80% Over the Past 5 Years. Michael Burry Is Buying the Dip.
summary: Michael Burry opened a new position in PayPal stock, calling the selloff technical rather than fundamental. Here's what he sees that others may be missing.

headline: PayPal Named Official Peer-to-Peer Payments Partner of the NFL
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc., a global leader in payments, today announced a groundbreaking partnership with the NFL, making it the league's official peer-to-peer (P2P) payments partner. Across the NFL ecosystem, PayPal will be at the center of how people send, receive, split, pool money, and settle-up instantly with each other all right there in the PayPal App.

headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Should Get More Attention and 2 We Turn Down
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

headline: Kikoff Appoints Chief Financial Officer and Chief Legal Officer, Deepening Executive Bench Amid Rapid Growth
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 21, 2026--Kikoff announced the appointments of John Kaelle as Chief Financial Officer and Robert Mahnke as Chief Legal Officer.
